title: India’s strong core can extend goldilocks ride: RBI's Sanjay Malhotra
description: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra stated that India's economy is healthy and robust, with broad-based growth and increased investment. He anticipates interest rates will remain stable or decrease due to benign inflation. While acknowledging global uncertainties, Malhotra expressed confidence in the economy's sustained 'Goldilocks phase'.
